title: vangueriopsis lanciflora
intro: Vangueriopsis lanciflora, also known as the 'Tonga tree', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Vangueriopsis lanciflora include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and infections. In herbal preparations, Vangueriopsis lanciflora is often used as a decoction or infusion to make a tea, which can be used to treat various health issues.
